name: XVS End-of-March Prediction

analysis_summary: 根据提供的XVS价格预测文档，设计了包括加密货币交易者、DeFi分析师、新闻媒体、市场参与者、Venus协议、BNB链、Aave和巨鲸等实体类型。关系类型反映了他们之间的交易、分析、报道、参与、竞争和影响等互动关系，用于模拟社交媒体舆论。
simulation_requirement: Predict the price of XVS (Venus Protocol) on March 31, 2026. The token has rallied +17.5% from $2.842 to $3.34 over 9 days (March 9-17). Simulate how crypto traders, DeFi analysts, news outlets, and market participants would react over the next 14 days. Consider bullish continuation, consolidation, or mean-reversion scenarios. Provide a specific price prediction with confidence range.
